allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -like ''*vite*'' -or $_.ProcessName -like ''*python*'' -or $_.ProcessName -like ''*node*'' } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id, MainWindowTitle")
Bash(python manage.py showmigrations outlets accounts distribution)
Bash(python manage.py shell -c "from apps.outlets.models import Outlet; [print\(f''ID: {o.id} | Name: {o.name} | Type: {o.outlet_type}''\) for o in Outlet.objects.all\(\)]")
